name: Innovative International Acquisition Corp. Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Innovative International Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus on high-growth industries, including the technology, media, and telecommunications (TMT) sectors. It is headquartered in Hong Kong.
